title: Speedruns Destroyed
description: A Minecraft Datapack that makes speedrunners cry.
body:
# Speedruns Destroyed

A Minecraft datapack designed to make speedrunners cry tears of pain!

## How It Works

This pack **changes the crafting recipe for Eyes of Ender**, making them a **true endgame challenge.**

To craft a single Eye of Ender, you now need to explore multiple dangerous structures and defeat their guardians. No more easy Ender Pearl + Blaze Powder combo—welcome to pain mode!

## What You’ll Need

Before reaching the End, prepare to conquer:

- Ancient City (Echo Shard – guarded by the Warden)

- Nether Fortress (Blaze Powder – from Blazes)

- Trial Chambers (Wind Charge – from Breezes)

- Ocean Monument (Prismarine Shard – from Guardians)

- Enderman (for the classic Ender Pearl)

## New Recipe

Instead of 2 simple ingredients, you now need these 5 rare items:

- Echo Shard

- Blaze Powder

- Ender Pearl

- Wind Charge

- Prismarine Shard

Combine them in any order on the crafting table to receive 2 Eyes of Ender. (Visual guide available in the gallery.)

Good luck, because speedrunning just got destroyed.

## Installation

Datapack Version: Drop the folder into your world’s `datapacks` directory.

Mod Version: Put the .jar file into your game’s `mods` folder (Fabric/Forge).

Enjoy… if you dare!
